label: on_voice
text: She came in wanting to cover a scar she never chose. We spent the consult picking flowers that actually meant something to her. Now it's hers. 🌸 DM me to start your design.
why: Opens on the client; names the consult; soft CTA; one approved emoji; sensitive without pity.

label: on_voice
text: First tattoo? Good. We'll go slow. Free consult, no pressure to book — bring the idea even if you can't draw it, and ask me anything. No dumb questions.
why: Approved free-consult claim; calm women-first register; speaks to the nervous first-timer.

label: on_voice
text: Neo-traditional color lives or dies on saturation. Bold lines, packed color, built to still read bright once it's healed. That's the work. #neotraditionaltattoo #floraltattoo #austintattoo
why: Craft over hype; specific hashtags; no superlatives; confidence without bravado.

label: on_voice
text: This room is women-first on purpose. Private, appointment-only, no rush and no one talking over you. Bring your idea — we'll take our time. 🤍
why: Approved appointment-only claim; safe-space positioning; approved emoji; warm invite.

label: on_voice
text: Floral half-sleeve we built over three sessions — peonies for her mom, wildflowers for where she grew up. Healed and settled now. 🌷 Consults are free — link in bio.
why: Client's story carries it; custom/approved consult claim; soft CTA; approved emoji.

label: off_voice
reason: hard near-miss: right topic, girlboss hype voice + banned emoji + rule-of-three + hard close
text: Unleash your inner queen 👑✨ This stunning floral cover-up is bold, beautiful, and SO you. You deserve this, babe — treat yourself and slay. Book now! 🔥
why: Same topic (floral cover-up) but every banned move: queen/slay/babe girlboss hype, banned emoji, rule-of-three, hard close. The subtle fail the posting gate must catch.

label: off_voice
reason: unapproved claims: superlative + pain promise + price/discount + walk-in
text: BEST tattoos in Austin, 100% painless guaranteed. $50 flash Friday — walk in today, no appointment needed! Voted #1 studio.
why: Superlatives, pain promise, price/discount, walk-in framing — all outside approved claims and against the appointment-only positioning.

label: off_voice
reason: wrong register: corporate/SaaS sludge, faceless we
text: At Ladies First, we leverage industry-leading expertise to deliver premium, bespoke body-art solutions tailored to the modern woman. Contact our team to learn more.
why: Faceless corporate 'we', no client story, no real voice — the generic-SaaS failure this skill exists to prevent.
